meaning: n.[矿]蒙脱石,胶岭石,高岭石
examples: The swelling behavior of montmorillonite in water was studied.
There are minerals absorbing uranium: zeolite, montmorillonite, carbonaceous matter.
Sodium montmorillonite can be freeze-dried into a spongelike material known as an aerogel. Aerogels are famously fragile.

Dr Schiraldi's approach does this by using a silicate clay called sodium montmorillonite as a skeleton that holds the plastic together.
